message:
style(frame): normalize rustfmt formatting in from_csv_with_options

Leftover formatting corrections from the preceding rustfmt normalization
pass: wrap DType::Int64 CSV parse arm in explicit braces for consistency
with adjacent arms, and reflow the ok_or_else chain for index_col lookup
to multi-line style.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
